title: ctenitis multilobata
intro: Ctenitis multilobata, also known as the many-lobed ctenitis or multilobed fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis multilobata include its ability to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to improve digestive health and reduce inflammation. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies, such as tinctures and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
